subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Countenance of Being and believed in God, the Almighty, the Glorious, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی قبله الوجود و آمن بالله المقتدر العزیز الحکیم و سمع
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
